hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by drawing the sky background covering the whole canvas

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You'll need to check if "cloud" is in the elements list to decide the sun size

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a for-each loop to iterate through the elements and draw each one

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use helper functions like drawSky(), drawSun(size), drawCloud(), drawRain(), drawSnow() to keep your code organized
